10:I[28359,["/_next/static/chunks/1a07vrc_g7cpi.js","/_next/static/chunks/03oxb51ed3wut.js","/_next/static/chunks/33ri80_jlu98-.js"],"default"]
11:I[42155,["/_next/static/chunks/1a07vrc_g7cpi.js","/_next/static/chunks/03oxb51ed3wut.js","/_next/static/chunks/33ri80_jlu98-.js"],""]
4:["$","main",null,{"style":{"background":"var(--bg)","minHeight":"100vh","color":"var(--fg)","fontFamily":"var(--font-sans)"},"children":[["$","script",null,{"type":"application/ld+json","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"{\"@context\":\"https://schema.org\",\"@type\":\"Article\",\"headline\":\"The 7-Point Title Verification Checklist Before You Buy Land in Punjab\",\"description\":\"Most land disputes in the Tricity trace back to checks that were skipped at purchase. This is the exact verification sequence we run on every property before recommending it — usable by any buyer.\",\"datePublished\":\"2026-07-19\",\"author\":{\"@type\":\"Person\",\"name\":\"Inder Thakral\"},\"publisher\":{\"@type\":\"Organization\",\"name\":\"Inder Thakral Property Consultants\"},\"mainEntityOfPage\":\"https://www.inderthakral.com/insights/punjab-land-title-verification-checklist/\"}"}}],["$","$L10",null,{"active":"Insights"}],["$","section",null,{"style":{"paddingTop":"128px","paddingBottom":"60px","paddingLeft":"48px","paddingRight":"48px","borderBottom":"1px solid rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.04)","background":"radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 50%, rgba(var(--accent-rgb),0.03) 0%, transparent 60%)"},"className":"section-pad","children":["$","div",null,{"style":{"maxWidth":"760px","margin":"0 auto"},"children":[["$","$L11",null,{"href":"/insights/","className":"hover-line","style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.4)","fontSize":"11px","letterSpacing":"2px","textTransform":"uppercase","textDecoration":"none","fontFamily":"var(--font-mono)","fontWeight":500,"display":"inline-flex","alignItems":"center","gap":"8px","marginBottom":"40px"},"children":"← Tricity Market Notes"}],["$","div",null,{"style":{"display":"flex","gap":"16px","alignItems":"center","marginBottom":"28px","flexWrap":"wrap"},"children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"var(--accent)","fontSize":"10px","letterSpacing":"3px","textTransform":"uppercase","fontFamily":"var(--font-mono)","fontWeight":600,"border":"1px solid rgba(var(--accent-rgb),0.25)","padding":"6px 14px","borderRadius":"2px"},"children":"Buyer Guide"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.3)","fontSize":"11px","letterSpacing":"2px","textTransform":"uppercase","fontFamily":"var(--font-mono)","fontWeight":500},"children":["July 2026"," · ","5 min read"]}]]}],["$","h1",null,{"style":{"fontSize":"clamp(30px, 4.5vw, 52px)","fontWeight":700,"lineHeight":1.15,"letterSpacing":"-2px","color":"var(--fg)","marginBottom":"28px"},"children":"The 7-Point Title Verification Checklist Before You Buy Land in Punjab"}],["$","p",null,{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.5)","fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8},"children":"Most land disputes in the Tricity trace back to checks that were skipped at purchase. This is the exact verification sequence we run on every property before recommending it — usable by any buyer."}]]}]}],["$","section",null,{"style":{"padding":"56px 48px"},"className":"section-pad","children":["$","div",null,{"style":{"maxWidth":"760px","margin":"0 auto"},"children":[[["$","div","0",{"style":{"marginBottom":"48px"},"children":["$undefined",[["$","p","0",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"Every week we meet buyers who fell in love with a plot before anyone checked whether the seller could actually convey clean title to it. In Punjab, where land records span jamabandi registers, mutation entries, and authority allotments, a property can look perfect on the ground and still carry defects that surface years later — usually when you try to sell."}],["$","p","1",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"This is the checklist we run before any property earns a recommendation. None of it is exotic; all of it is skippable in the excitement of a deal, and skipping any single point is how disputes are born."}]]]}],["$","div","1",{"style":{"marginBottom":"48px"},"children":[["$","h2",null,{"style":{"color":"var(--fg)","fontSize":"clamp(20px, 2.5vw, 26px)","fontWeight":600,"letterSpacing":"-0.5px","lineHeight":1.3,"marginBottom":"24px"},"children":["$L12","The seven checks"]}],["$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18","$L19"]]}],"$L1a"],"$L1b"]}]}],"$L1c"]}]
12:["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"var(--accent)","marginRight":"12px"},"children":"◈"}]
13:["$","p","0",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"One — chain of title. Trace ownership back through the sale deeds, not just the current one. Gaps, unregistered transfers, or a link resting on a general power of attorney are red flags that must be resolved before money moves."}]
14:["$","p","1",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"Two — jamabandi and mutation. The revenue record must show the seller as owner, and every past transfer must have a completed mutation entry. A sale deed without its mutation is a transaction the revenue record does not yet believe."}]
15:["$","p","2",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"Three — encumbrance search. Loans, mortgages, and liens follow the land, not the seller. A registrar's encumbrance check plus a CERSAI search catches most charges; for authority plots, confirm no dues are outstanding with the authority itself."}]
16:["$","p","3",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"Four — litigation check. Search the property and the seller's name in the local civil courts and revenue courts. Pending partition suits among family members are the classic Tricity trap."}]
17:["$","p","4",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"Five — land use and layout sanction. Confirm the plot's zoning matches your intent — agricultural land sold as 'residential' without change of land use is a problem you inherit. For township plots, verify the layout is sanctioned and the specific plot number exists in the approved layout."}]
18:["$","p","5",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"Six — authority NOCs and dues. For GMADA, PUDA, or municipal plots: no-dues certificate, transfer permission, and confirmation that the allotment is not cancelled or under resumption proceedings."}]
19:["$","p","6",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"Seven — physical possession and demarcation. Walk the land with the revenue official's demarcation. Paper boundaries and fence lines disagree more often than buyers expect, and an encroachment discovered after registration is your dispute to fund."}]
1a:["$","div","2",{"style":{"marginBottom":"48px"},"children":[["$","h2",null,{"style":{"color":"var(--fg)","fontSize":"clamp(20px, 2.5vw, 26px)","fontWeight":600,"letterSpacing":"-0.5px","lineHeight":1.3,"marginBottom":"24px"},"children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"var(--accent)","marginRight":"12px"},"children":"◈"}],"The rule we never break"]}],[["$","p","0",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"No single document proves a clean title; the checks only work as a sequence, because each one catches what the previous one cannot see. This is why 'the papers look fine' from a seller's agent is not diligence — it is a sales line."}],["$","p","1",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"Every property we recommend has already been through this sequence, which is what '100% title verified' means on our listings. If you are evaluating land anywhere in the Tricity — including property we are not selling — we are happy to run the same checks for you before you commit."}]]]}]
1b:["$","div",null,{"style":{"marginTop":"24px","padding":"40px","background":"rgba(var(--accent-rgb),0.03)","border":"1px solid rgba(var(--accent-rgb),0.1)","borderRadius":"16px"},"children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"color":"var(--accent)","fontSize":"10px","letterSpacing":"4px","textTransform":"uppercase","fontFamily":"var(--font-mono)","marginBottom":"12px","fontWeight":600},"children":"Written by Inder Thakral"}],["$","p",null,{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.5)","fontSize":"14px","lineHeight":1.8,"marginBottom":"28px"},"children":["Principal Advisor — ",38,"+ years in Tricity real estate. Every property recommendation is personally verified, every title checked."]}],["$","$L11",null,{"href":"/#contact","className":"cta-btn magnetic-btn tap-glow","children":"Discuss Your Requirement →"}]]}]
1c:["$","footer",null,{"style":{"padding":"48px 48px","borderTop":"1px solid rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.04)","display":"flex","justifyContent":"space-between","alignItems":"center","flexWrap":"wrap","gap":"24px","background":"rgba(var(--bg-rgb),0.5)"},"children":[["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","div",null,{"style":{"color":"var(--accent)","fontSize":"10px","letterSpacing":"4px","textTransform":"uppercase","fontFamily":"var(--font-mono)","fontWeight":700},"children":"Inder Thakral Property Consultants"}],["$","div",null,{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.3)","fontSize":"12px","marginTop":"6px","letterSpacing":"0.5px"},"children":["2026 · ","SCO 124, Thakral Towers, Sector 108, Emaar, Landran Banur Road, Mohali - 140306"]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.2)","fontSize":"10px","letterSpacing":"3px","textTransform":"uppercase","fontFamily":"var(--font-mono)","fontWeight":500},"children":"Verified Title Deeds · By Appointment Only"}]]}]
a:[["$","meta","0",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}],["$","meta","2",{"name":"theme-color","content":"#16191F"}]]
1d:I[6607,["/_next/static/chunks/1a07vrc_g7cpi.js","/_next/static/chunks/03oxb51ed3wut.js"],"IconMark"]
